user_query:
Please generate a multi-age family genetics workshop curriculum from the provided local files and script so I can share it with my relatives before we participate in a research study. Use the included content and config to build the curriculum, and fix any configuration issues you encounter. Specifically:

- Inputs (already in the workspace):
  - Script: tools/build_curriculum.py
  - Config: config/curriculum.json
  - Lesson content directory: content/

- Required actions and constraints:
  1) Try running the build command: python tools/build_curriculum.py --config config/curriculum.json --content content --out out
  2) If the command fails (e.g., an error about age_groups), resolve it by inspecting and adjusting the configuration and/or the script so the build completes. Do not remove age groups that have lesson files; only align the config and script as needed so the intended age groups are recognized.
  3) Inspect the content/ directory to confirm which lesson files exist and which age groups they are labeled for; ensure the config’s age group list corresponds to the actual files present so each listed group has at least one lesson included in the output.
  4) After a successful run, produce all of the following outputs under out/:
     - out/family_genetics_curriculum.md (the compiled curriculum handout with separate sections for kids, teens, and adults)
     - out/plan.csv (a per-age-group schedule with columns: age_group, order, lesson_file, lesson_title, topics, estimated_minutes)
     - out/metadata.json (summary including counts per age group and topic coverage booleans per group)
     - out/run_log.txt (first lines: a brief note describing what you changed and why; then the full stdout+stderr from the final successful run)
  5) Keep the module duration from the config when generating the schedule. Do not alter the lesson content text itself; only fix configuration/script issues as needed to complete the build.

- Success criteria I will check locally:
  - The build command runs successfully, with any initial errors resolved by appropriate changes to the configuration and/or script.
  - out/family_genetics_curriculum.md, out/plan.csv, and out/metadata.json exist and are consistent with the lesson files in content/ and the config settings (e.g., age groups match, topics reflect the content files).
  - out/metadata.json shows topic coverage true for each required topic per age group defined in the config.
  - out/run_log.txt contains both the brief explanation of the fix and the verbatim combined output of the final successful command. All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
